column1: Is the yield on BP’s bonds maturing in about a decade to two decades, under a leverage and interest coverage maintenance clause with a grace period, less than or equal to the yield on Siemens AG’s bonds that last from twenty to thirty years with the same type of covenant?,"SELECT (SELECT CouponAdjustedYield FROM IssuerCreditYieldRegistry WHERE IssuerLEI = ""BP p.l.c.""
